rationale: Educ. Code §39.0545 governs alternative campus performance evaluation methods for the 2020-2021 school year. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The commissioner shall adopt rules to develop and implement alternative methods and standards for evaluating the performance for the 2020-2021 school year of a campus to which this section applies.
_note: No conflict. The rule addresses school accountability ratings, not tax exemptions.
